hooks.command: cd OCOrder && npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund && node build.mjs

cd /Users/matthewhe/Documents/ClaudeProject/OCC_Order/tocs-deploy && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo 'No changes to commit' || (git commit -m "chore: auto-sync $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push git@github.com:matthewhe22/Ocorder.git main 2>&1 | tail -5)
